title: LogicalCollectionConditionReportingConfig
description: LogicalCollectionConditionReportingConfig: Config object containing settings for reporting results of checks against logical conditions with a collection of nested conditions.

NestedConfigs.description: Dictionary of reporting configs (values) bound to the conditions, which results they are meant to format (keys).

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
